name: Game Creator AI
description: Free, browser-based platform for generating unlimited games with AI. Two apps: educational learning games and entertainment game prototyping. BYOK or local model support.

apps.name: Game Creator Learn
apps.description: Educational game generator for teachers, tutors, and students. Creates learning games with lesson structure, quizzes, and classroom-ready themes.

apps.name: Game Creator AI
apps.description: Entertainment game generator for rapid prototyping. Builds arcade, platformer, shooter, strategy, and other game types with prompt-driven creation.
